productDisplayName: Nike Men Dunk High Black Sports Shoes
description: Designed for superior performance and comfort, the nike Dunk Low has a heel counter to provide ample structural support, protecting the ankle from sprains and injuries while running. Coupled with an uber cool look is its superior traction feature that makes the nike Dunk Low a huge favourite both on the track and off it. If you enjoy donning that sporty look, simply pair the Dunk Low with jeans and casual tees.UpperSynthetic and textile upper for maximum ventilation and durabilityPadded tongue and textile lined sockliner for snug Fit and added protection from shockLace-up system for snug fitMidsoleFull length EVA midsole for added cushioning and impact protectionMildly cushioned footbed for all-day comfortOutsoleFlexible multi-directional rubber outsole with a full cupsole stitch for durabilitySemi-circular grooved forefoot with pivot point for easy 180° rotation of the foot without causing injuryshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
